basic_details.job_title: IIT Delhi Jr Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Jr. Project Assistant (Technical) Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their application via Email. The last date to send the application email is 18-06-2026.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech in Computer Science/Electronics/Machincal, having 1st class or B.E. in Data Science/Electronics/Electrical having 1st class or equivalent.
qualification.details: Jr. Project Assistant (Technical): B.Tech in Computer Science/Electronics/Machincal, having 1st class or B.E. in Data Science/Electronics/Electrical having 1st class or equivalent in the appropriate discipline. Experience: Solid Conceptual as well as hands-on understanding of modern machine learning/deep learning techniques. Prior experience with deep neural networks for visual recognition tasks such as image classification object detection or semantic segmentation.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on qualifications and experience. Online interview.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Delhi Jr. Project Assistant (Technical) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 18-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Jr. Project Assistant (Technical) post at IIT Delhi?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Jr. Project Assistant (Technical) position at IIT Delhi is 18th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Jr. Project Assistant (Technical) role?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a B.Tech in Computer Science/Electronics/Machincal or a B.E. in Data Science/Electronics/Electrical, both with a first-class division or equivalent.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Jr. Project Assistant (Technical) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 29,290 to Rs. 38,220/- per month, plus House Rent Allowance (HRA) at 30%.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted via email. You need to download the application form from the IRD website, fill it out completely, and send it to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q5. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is IITD/IRD/135/2026.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any experience required for this post?
faq.answer: Yes, prior experience with deep neural networks for visual recognition tasks such as image classification, object detection, or semantic segmentation is desirable.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Jr. Project Assistant (Technical) post.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The link to the official notification PDF can be found in the "Important Links" section of this article.

faq.question: Q9. What is the email address to send the application?
faq.answer: The application should be emailed to [email protected].

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: This is a project-based job at IIT Delhi.
